testcase.name: test_batch_metrics_skips_nonexistent_programs

failure.message: AssertionError: Non-existent program should be skipped assert 'nonexistent-program-id-12345' not in {'15d08982-3c51-4761-9b83-67414484582e': {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'coach_flag_count': 1, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:07:57.043490+00:00', 'data_confidence': 'HIGH', ...}, 'a54a0014-0e83-4a16-b0c2-5e8f10401de2': {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'coach_flag_count': 1, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:07:57.159967+00:00', 'data_confidence': 'MEDIUM', ...}, 'nonexistent-program-id-12345': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.569994+00:00', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_metrics.py:371: in test_batch_metrics_skips_nonexistent_programs assert "nonexistent-program-id-12345" not in metrics, "Non-existent program should be skipped" E AssertionError: Non-existent program should be skipped E assert 'nonexistent-program-id-12345' not in {'15d08982-3c51-4761-9b83-67414484582e': {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'coach_flag_count': 1, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:07:57.043490+00:00', 'data_confidence': 'HIGH', ...}, 'a54a0014-0e83-4a16-b0c2-5e8f10401de2': {'athlete_id': 'athlete_3', 'coach_flag_count': 1, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:07:57.159967+00:00', 'data_confidence': 'MEDIUM', ...}, 'nonexistent-program-id-12345': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.569994+00:00', ...}}

testcase.name: test_batch_metrics_all_invalid_returns_empty

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected empty metrics for invalid IDs, got 3 assert 3 == 0 + where 3 = len({'fake-1': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.971389+00:00', ...}, 'fake-2': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.971877+00:00', ...}, 'fake-3': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.972297+00:00', ...}})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch_metrics.py:388: in test_batch_metrics_all_invalid_returns_empty assert len(metrics) == 0, f"Expected empty metrics for invalid IDs, got {len(metrics)}" E AssertionError: Expected empty metrics for invalid IDs, got 3 E assert 3 == 0 E + where 3 = len({'fake-1': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.971389+00:00', ...}, 'fake-2': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.971877+00:00', ...}, 'fake-3': {'_error': 'Program not found', 'athlete_id': '', 'coach_flag_count': 0, 'computed_at': '2026-03-11T04:16:17.972297+00:00', ...}})
